generated_oml:
instance LiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor for capturing 3D point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARDataTransmission
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for collecting vehicle state data (speed, position, etc.)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmission
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electric motor for propulsion control"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle direction control"
]

instance LiDARDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDAR
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance RawPointCloud : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler, DataCollectingFE
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed and position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectingFE, DataTranslationEnabler, ACCSystemEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks derived from LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering and tracking for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RawPointCloud
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateData, ObjectTracksData, ProjectedDrivingPathData
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for internal software component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for AI and machine learning processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance Python : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming language for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for collecting data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RawPointCloud, VehicleStateData
]

instance ACCSystemEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC system for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTracksData, VehicleStateData
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and driving paths with reporting capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system computations from ECUs to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedComputationInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speeds, and issuing emergency braking commands via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state and detected objects"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ability to save and generate reports from collected data"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle for ACC"
]

instance SpeedComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computing speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending actuation commands to vehicle actuators"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set the desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command issued by operator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle with ADAS capabilities for ACC, encompassing compute, sensors, actuators, and hosting Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking functions"
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin component for processing and visualization"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface component for monitoring and control"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization interface for vehicle data"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel for issuing commands to the vehicle"
]

instance DTEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, DigitalTwin, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the ACC Controlling FE are translated via the Data Translation component and sent to the Actuation FE, which drives Motor and Steering Servo actuators. Commands are communicated using ROS2 for internal software components and Wi-Fi UDP for inter-entity transmission."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading, as mandated by hardware limitations. While safety-critical vehicular standards typically require stricter synchronization than 100 ms, the current implementation adheres to the 100 ms threshold due to existing hardware constraints."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as individual ROS2 packages, each containing one or more ROS2 nodes. The three core entities—Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User—are organized to handle resource management, data processing, and user interaction respectively, with Physical Twin Entity specifically managing sensor data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication functionality on dedicated hardware."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication occurs over a Wi-Fi network using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle state data is stored on a device external to the vehicle. No additional details on hosting platforms, computational requirements, scalability, or reliability mechanisms are provided in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard (parts 1-4), where Part 2 defines the reference architecture entities (Observable Manufacturing Element, Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, User Entity), and Functional Entities implement tasks such as data transformation using protocols like OPC Unified Architecture for interoperability."
]
